mapper.select: SELECT project_type AS typeValue, COUNT(*) AS projectCount, SUM(CASE WHEN actual_end_time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedCount, SUM(total_investment) AS totalInvestment, SUM(central_fund_arrive) AS arrivedFund FROM declare_project GROUP BY project_type
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM declare_project WHERE actual_end_time IS NOT NULL

SELECT u.province_id AS provinceId, COUNT(p.id) AS projectCount, ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(p.actual_progress), 0), 0) AS progress, CASE WHEN SUM(IFNULL(p.total_investment, 0)) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(p.accumulated_investment, 0)) / SUM(IFNULL(p.total_investment, 0)) * 100, 0) ELSE 0 END AS fundRate, SUM(CASE WHEN p.actual_progress < 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS highRiskCount FROM declare_project p LEFT JOIN system_users u ON p.leader_user_id = u.id WHERE u.province_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY u.province_id ORDER BY COUNT(p.id) DESC
